case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS I. MAGNIN INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $68.36 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT I. MAGNIN INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT I. MAGNIN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT I. MAGNIN INC. $68.36 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $123.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT I. MAGNIN INC.
